sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ شَيْمَاءُ أَنْ تَبْدَأَ بِالتَّمَارِينِ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Šejma je odlučila početi s vježbanjem po prvi put.
sentences.translationEn: Shayma decided to start exercising for the first time.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى نَادِي رِيَاضِيٍّ قَرِيبٍ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Otišla je u sportski klub blizu svoje kuće.
sentences.translationEn: She went to a sports club near her house.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتِ الْمُدَرِّبَ عَنِ التَّمَارِينِ الْمُنَاسِبَةِ لِلْمُبْتَدِئِينَ.
sentences.translation: Pitala je trenera o odgovarajućim vježbama za početnike.
sentences.translationEn: She asked the trainer about suitable exercises for beginners.

sentences.translation: Počela je malim koracima i uživala u vježbanju.
sentences.translationEn: She started with simple steps and enjoyed the exercise.
